title: Market Pulse
excerpt: Analytical summary: Extreme fear sentiment prevails, with the Fear & Greed index at 9. Institutional consolidation is expected ahead of the Fed Chair Powell speech and GDP m/m release. Regulatory friction is anticipated to impact the Indian market, with the U.S. dollar and gold prices influencing the Indian rupee.
